name: Grilled Eggplant & Basil Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: 3 Cloves Garlic, peeled and thinly sliced
1 cup Basil leaves (about), torn into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
This dish's flavors improve with time, so prepare it when your grill is ready. Grill the eggplant as the coals die down, assemble the recipe, and it will be ready for a meal the next day.
Slice the eggplants lengthwise or diagonally into pieces about 1/2-inch thick. Discard the end pieces that are mostly skin. Brush each piece on both sides with oil and grill over the coals (you can also fry the slices in a pan or broil them if you prefer). To make crisscross grill marks, turn each slice at a 45-degree angle and cook until the eggplant is nicely colored and tender.
As you work, add cooked eggplant to a non-reactive dish. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper, scatter garlic slices and torn basil leaves on top, and splash a little vinegar over all. Continue adding eggplant layers until everything is used. The warmth from the eggplant will enhance the flavors of the garlic and basil. Cover the dish and refrigerate for several hours or overnight before serving.
